name: Buttermilk Pancakes (Use Mix #23)
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups Buttermilk, or more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the pancake mix and soda together.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the eggs with a whisk until well mixed. Add 2 2/3 cups buttermilk and melted butter, then whisk in the sifted dry ingredients. Adjust the batter's thickness by adding more buttermilk if necessary.
3. Cook using your usual method.
